ES1! · CME · RTH PLAN · MONDAY JUN 22, 2026 · UPDATED 08:25 ET (RTH OPEN)

ES RTH Plan — Repair Confirmed, Poor High Test

Charts: 30-min RTH+ETH (08:19 ET) · TPO with ON levels (08:16 ET) · Volume Profile P/V nodes · Prior plan: Jun 22 05:40 ET
Last 7,570.00–7,572.00 (at yVAH)
ON range 7,537 → 7,578.50
ON value: VAH 7,576.00 · POC 7,561.00 · VAL 7,537.75
ON POC ABOVE yVAL — value migrated up, split resolved
yPOC 7,562.75 / yVAH 7,570.75 — ACCEPTED
Poor High 7,578.50 / 7,581.50 — no excess
P 7565.25 (132.4K) flipped support · V 7576.25 · P 7589.25 (222.4K)
20-EMA 7,525.50 · ATR 106.75
▲ What changed since 05:40 — Repair confirmed. yPOC wall broken, ON value migrated up into yesterday's value The 05:40 plan had price pressing yPOC 7,563 from below, with ON value entirely BELOW yVAL 7,548.50 and a split POC 7,536/7,541.25 — a weak, unsettled repair. Between 06:00–08:00 ET ES accepted ABOVE yPOC 7,562.75 with two 30-min closes, rallied to yVAH 7,570.75, and tagged Poor Highs 7,578.50 / 7,581.50. The overnight auction cleaned up: ON VAH 7,576.00 / ON POC 7,561.00 / ON VAL 7,537.75 — ON POC is now sitting ON yPOC, ON VAH is above yVAH. The split is gone. Volume Profile confirms: P 7565.25 (132.466K) flipped from resistance to support, next overhead is V 7576.25 (97.4K) then heavy P 7589.25 (222.473K). G1 ON-Value Dip Buy 7,538–7,548 worked full TP at yPOC. G3 yPOC Fade Short 7,563–7,570 worked for a scalp, then stopped on acceptance. Bias flips: Neutral / Repair-at-supply → Bull-Repair Confirmed. Do NOT fade yPOC anymore — it is support. Poor highs 7,578.5 / 7,581.5 are the new first-tag fade. Iran headline faded intraday; VIX assumed <19.

STRUCTURE MAP — 08:19 ET 7,694 — ATH 7,648.75 / 7,654.5 — Poor high 7,612.50 — V High 7,597.25 — V (149K) 7,589.25 — P HEAVY (222K) 7,578.50 / 7,581.50 — Poor High — CAP 7,576.25 — V (97.4K) 7,576.00 — ON VAH 7,570.75 — yVAH ◄ YOU ARE HERE 7,570 7,562.75 / 7,565.25 — yPOC / P — SUPPORT FLIP 7,561.00 — ON POC 7,548.50 — yVAL 7,545.25 — V (86.9K) 7,537.75 — ON VAL 7,525.50 — 20-EMA 7,496.25 / 7,480.25 / 7,458.25 — deep shelf 220K–292K

Profile narrative: The 05:40 "repair-at-supply, value-below" read is resolved. ES accepted above yPOC 7,562.75 with volume, ON value migrated up into yesterday's value, split POC resolved to a clean ON POC 7,561.00. P 7565.25 flipped support. You are now trading AT yVAH 7,570.75, with Poor Highs 7,578.5 / 7,581.5 as the immediate cap. Acceptance > 7,576–7,581 unlocks the heavy P 7589.25 (222K) → 7,597 → 7,612.5. Failure back below ON POC 7,561 / yPOC 7,562.75 returns to two-sided range mode 7,548–7,570, and loss of ON VAL 7,537.75 re-arms the Iran-fail case toward 7,496 / 7,480.

VIX/macro: VIX carried 18.50 at 05:40 — re-verify at the open. Iran headline faded in ON trade; oil flat/lower assumed. Chip bid (Intel +5% ON) helped the repair. No US data Monday. Tape trades: Poor High acceptance / rejection.

Conditions to trade RTH

✓ Repair confirmed — long dipsAcceptance > yPOC 7,562.75 confirmed. yPOC / P 7565.25 is now support. Buy pullbacks to 7,561–7,565, stop under ON POC / yVAL.

Base case (updated)Open at yVAH 7,570.75 testing Poor High 7,578.5–7,581.5. Expect a pullback to 7,561–7,565 (ON POC / yPOC / P 7565) that holds, then re-test of the Poor High. First tag at Poor High rejects more often than breaks — take profits. Long dips, do not short yPOC — it is support now. Acceptance > 7,581.5 unlocks heavy P 7589.25 → 7,597 → 7,612.5. Failure < 7,561 returns to range 7,548–7,570; loss of 7,537.75 ON VAL re-arms the Iran fail.

Position size vs ATR — applies to all threeATR 106.75; ON used ~41. 50–60% size, ¼-size on the Poor High fade-short scalp. Do NOT short yPOC 7,563 anymore — it is support. The 05:40 G1/G3 trades are closed: G1 worked full TP, G3 worked scalp then stopped. New edge is buy the breakout retest 7,561–7,565, fade Poor High first tag only. Hard rule: Iran-escalation headline = flat longs first, reassess for G4/G5; acceptance > 7,581.5 = don't be short.

09Structural Warnings — updated 08:25 ET

✓ yPOC 7,562.75 / P 7565.25 — SUPPORT FLIP, do not fadeTwo 30-min closes above, volume node flipped. This is now your long trigger, not your short. Shorting it is fighting acceptance.
⚠ Poor Highs 7,578.5 / 7,581.5 — first real supply, no excessFirst RTH tags reject more often than break. Fade with a tight stop 7,588. Break needs acceptance > 7,581.5 to be tradeable — then ride to P 7589.25 (222K).
ℹ Volume Profile overhead: V 7576.25 → P 7589.25 (222K) → V 7597.25P 7589.25 is the heavy node — take profits into it on a breakout. V High 7612.5 is the next structural cap.
⚠ Failed-repair risk: loss of 7,561 ON POCIf 7,561–7,565 fails to hold, the repair is negated — back to range mode 7,548–7,570 (G4). Close < ON VAL 7,537.75 / 20-EMA re-arms the Iran fail toward 7,497 / 7,480 shelf.
⚠ Iran headline tail still liveWeekend deal wobble faded in ON trade, but Hormuz / strikes headline can still expand range down through the 20-EMA. VIX gate: <18.5 repair, 18.5–20 two-sided, >20 risk-off G4/G5.
ℹ Deep volume shelf 7,480.25–7,497.25 (270K–292K) / 7,458.25 (248K)Best-location dip-buy if ON VAL fails on a headline flush. Above 7,537 it's irrelevant.

ItemCall
Macro biasBULL (intact) — MA stack rising; 20-EMA held Iran dip; post-FOMC digestion resolving up
Intermediate biasBULL-REPAIR CONFIRMED — acceptance > yPOC 7,562.75, value migrated up, P 7565 flipped support
Intraday biasLONG DIPS — do not fade yPOC — buy 7,561–7,565, fade Poor High 7,578.5–7,581.5 first tag only
Base caseOpen at yVAH 7,570 → pullback to ON POC / yPOC / P 7,561–7,565 holds → re-test Poor High 7,578.5–7,581.5 → first tag rejected
Primary tradeLong 7,561–7,565, stop 7,554, targets 7,570 / 7,576 / 7,578.5 (G1)
Secondary tradeLong 7,556–7,561, stop 7,547, targets 7,570 / 7,576 / 7,578.5

Key bull level7,581.5 Poor High — acceptance unlocks 7,589.25 P (222K) → 7,597 → 7,612.5
Key bear level7,561 ON POC / yPOC — close below → failed repair → 7,548.5 → 7,537.75 ON VAL / 20-EMA → 7,480–7,497 shelf
Biggest riskPoor High rejection rolling back through yPOC support (failed repair); or Iran escalation breaking ON VAL / 20-EMA
